name: spore-example-11-multi-agent
description: spore-core TypeScript example 11: multi-agent composition. An orchestrator (PlanExecute) delegates to two isolated worker agents (ReAct) wrapped as SubagentTools — a research worker (web_search) and a writing worker (no tools) — then writes the assembled markdown to workspace/report.md. Agents are composable: the harness treats a function-tool and an agent-tool identically.
